1975.title: Battery connected to a power source

revisions.*:
'''6-5-245 

No English term

A battery connected to a power source so that at times of peak demand its ouput is added to that of the source, while at times of low demand the energy available from the source is sufficient to recharge the battery.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Battery connected to a power source}}
